title: The SXC-IGC Engine: Deterministic Multi-Domain Simulation and the Universal α=1.254 Scaling
description: This repository contains the SXC-IGC (Substrate X Coupling - Information Gravity Control) engine, a deterministic framework validated across domains. Key discovery: γ/β ∝ ρ^1.254 scaling in spacecraft anomalies. The same engine reproduces non-Newtonian fluid behavior and accurately stratifies seismic risk, suggesting α=1.254 is a universal exponent for state transitions.
